problem id: c54765cd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  11010111 -> 10111111
  00110100 -> 10100011
  11100110 -> 00111111
  10011000 -> 11001101
  00111110 -> 11110011
  01011011 -> 11011111
  10011100 -> 11101101
  01000101 -> 00101110

query: 11000010
predicted answer: 00011110
